scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ai-synthetic/shared-types && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @ai-synthetic/shared-types && node --import tsx --test packages/shared-types/src/**/*.test.ts services/deployment-intelligence-agent/src/**/*.test.ts services/playwright-execution-engine/src/**/*.test.ts services/root-cause-agent/src/**/*.test.ts services/webhook-receiver/src/**/*.test.ts
